r3ct_base_core.message.core_exists: You already have a Base Core! It is located at: X: %s Y: %s Z: %s (%s)
r3ct_base_core.message.core_exists_hint: If the block was destroyed due to an error, go to those coordinates to load the chunk. The game will notice it's missing and reset your limit.
r3ct_base_core.message.not_your_base: This is not your Base Core!
r3ct_base_core.config.title: R3CT Base Core - Client Configuration
r3ct_base_core.config.main.title: R3CT Base Core Configuration
r3ct_base_core.config.main.client_toolti: Visual settings, such as GUI scale.
r3ct_base_core.config.main.server_toolti: Server settings are only available in Singleplayer!
r3ct_base_core.config.server.title: Server Configuration
r3ct_base_core.gui.stats.title: BASE STATISTICS
r3ct_base_core.gui.tooltip.locked.title: Locked (Requires Pool %s)
r3ct_base_core.gui.tooltip.locked.desc: Upgrade the Base Core to gain access.
r3ct_base_core.gui.tooltip.tier0_desc: Build the Tier 1 upgrade to activate the Core.
r3ct_base_core.effect.fire_immunity.name: Fire Immunity Aura
r3ct_base_core.effect.fire_immunity.desc: Grants permanent fire resistance within the Base Core's range.
r3ct_base_core.effect.night_vision.name: Night Vision Aura
r3ct_base_core.effect.night_vision.desc: Grants permanent night vision within the Base Core's range.
r3ct_base_core.effect.slow_falling.name: Feather Fall Aura
r3ct_base_core.effect.slow_falling.desc: Reduces fall speed and prevents fall damage within the Base Core's range.
r3ct_base_core.effect.satiated.name: Satiation Aura
r3ct_base_core.effect.satiated.desc: Slowly regenerates hunger saturation within the Base Core's range.
r3ct_base_core.effect.growth_aura.name: Growth Aura
r3ct_base_core.effect.growth_aura.desc: Accelerates crop and plant growth within the Base Core's range.
r3ct_base_core.effect.mending_pulse.name: Mending Pulse
r3ct_base_core.effect.mending_pulse.desc: Periodically repairs Mending items in the inventory of players within range.
r3ct_base_core.message.effect.pool_locke: This effect pool is still locked!
r3ct_base_core.message.effect.already_un: This protocol has already been unlocked!
r3ct_base_core.message.effect.missing_xp: Not enough XP to unlock the effect.
r3ct_base_core.message.slot.not_unlocked: You haven't unlocked this effect yet!
r3ct_base_core.message.slot.already_in_u: This effect is already in use in another slot!
r3ct_base_core.advancement.root.title: Architect of a New Era
r3ct_base_core.advancement.root.desc: Obtain or place your very first Base Core.
r3ct_base_core.advancement.first_upgrade: Invest resources and upgrade the Base Core to Level 1.
r3ct_base_core.advancement.tier_5.title: Lord of the Manor
r3ct_base_core.advancement.tier_5.desc: Expand your territory by upgrading the core to Level 5.
r3ct_base_core.advancement.max_tier.desc: Reach the ultimate Level 11 Base Core. You own this place.
Unlock your first protocol in the Base Core.
r3ct_base_core.advancement.all_slots.des: Activate 4 different effects in the Base Core simultaneously.
r3ct_base_core.advancement.all_effects.d: Purchase access to absolutely every effect across all pools.
r3ct_base_core.advancement.safe_zone.des: Activate the Anti-Spawn and Grief Ward protocols simultaneously.
r3ct_base_core.advancement.farming_combo: Combine the Growth Aura and Anti-Trample effects on a single farm.
r3ct_base_core.advancement.moving_day.de: Destroy and pick up a max-level Base Core.
